title: Reno Tahoe Airport Authority Board of Trustees Appointments Update
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 19, 2026
TO: Mayor and Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Tyler Shaw, Agenda Manager
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Reno Tahoe Airport Authority Board of Trustees Appointments Update

This memo is intended to provide an update regarding the City of Reno's upcoming appointments to the Reno Tahoe Airport Authority (RTAA) Board of Trustees.

The City of Reno has received resignations from Edward Ableser and Kitty Jung, resulting in two vacancies on the RTAA Board of Trustees which must be filled by the Reno City Council. Because both trustees resigned prior to the completion of Edward Ableser's and Kitty Jung's terms, the Reno City Council will be asked to appoint individuals to fill the remainder of the unexpired terms, rather than new full terms. In addition to the two vacant City of Reno positions, there is currently a third vacancy on the RTAA Board of Trustees which must be filled by the Reno Sparks Convention and Visitor's Authority board.

The City of Reno's board, commission, and committee application portal for the two City of Reno vacancies is currently open and will remain open through 5:00 PM Monday, April 6, 2026. Following the closure of the application period, City Manager's Office staff anticipate bringing an appointment item forward for the Reno City Council's consideration at the April 22, 2026 Reno City Council meeting. There are currently 34 applications on file for the two vacant positions.

The Reno City Council will be asked to appoint two individuals to fill the remainder of the unexpired terms as follows:
• Edward Ableser's seat: April 22, 2026 – June 30, 2029
• Kitty Jung's seat: April 22, 2026 – June 30, 2027

City Manager's Office staff are communicating with all applicants to keep all applicants informed of the application timeline and the anticipated date of Reno City Council consideration.

fields.tldr: Two vacancies have opened on the Reno Tahoe Airport Authority Board of Trustees following resignations from Edward Ableser and Kitty Jung. The City of Reno's application portal is open through April 6, 2026, with 34 applications currently on file. The Reno City Council is expected to make appointments at its April 22, 2026 meeting to fill the remainder of each trustee's unexpired term. A separate third vacancy on the RTAA Board must be filled by the Reno Sparks Convention and Visitor's Authority.
fields.key_stats: 34 applications on file for 2 vacant positions; application portal open through 5:00 PM April 6, 2026; unexpired terms run through June 30, 2029 (Ableser seat) and June 30, 2027 (Jung seat)
fields.key_decisions: Reno City Council must appoint two individuals to fill the remainder of Edward Ableser's and Kitty Jung's unexpired terms on the RTAA Board of Trustees, anticipated at the April 22, 2026 Council meeting.
fields.action_items: City Manager's Office staff to bring appointment item forward for Council consideration at the April 22, 2026 Reno City Council meeting; staff are communicating with all applicants regarding the application timeline and anticipated consideration date.
